cpu: AMD A8-3850 APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes:
Starts. Runs. Playable. 

As stated before, you may run into a hardware accel. mouse issue = not being able to 'click' on an UI element. Alt-tabbing fixed it in 2 session, while alt-tabbing caused it(!) during another gameplay session. Windowed mode available, but borked (WINE virtual window frame rendering + mouse issues on my PC)
title: Panzer Corps

cpu: AMD A8-3870 APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes: Intro Video is broken. Main Menu works fine. Black screen and unclickable buttons after loading a scenario or campaign. Can be fixed by ALT-Tabbing. Then no issue and the game works perfectly fine.
title: Panzer Corps

notes: the main problem seems to be the multiple windows this game has. first time playing works without much trouble. but there will be a point were u can only alt+tab and kill it because mouseclicks or keyboard wont have any effect on the game. i would rate this as frustrating..
title: Panzer Corps

notes: The interface is unresponsive after loading maps, but can be fixed by switching to the other game window and pressing enter.
title: Panzer Corps

notes: mouse klick can become stuck - on the first screen so beware. after that u have to often alt-tab to the 2nd windows (round begin). other than those 2 annoying issues, it works perfectly. spent hours already.
title: Panzer Corps
